events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the reversed impulse-line tap orientation (gas taps below pipe, liquid taps on top) violates API RP 551's self-draining/self-venting geometry, trapping condensate in gas legs and gas in liquid legs — biasing the DP reading and risking freeze/plug or gas-lock while the transmitter is in service. Marked `fail`, `risk: high`, with corrective re-routing/re-sloping and recalibration actions listed.
